title: Explicit Moral Circle Affinity Model

universal.meaning: baseline moral concern for any human being

model.null_meaning: not meaningful / not applicable for this respondent

part_a.prompt_concept: How much moral concern should politics give to any human being, regardless of where they live or which group they belong to?

part_b.response: same 0..100 scale plus not meaningful option
scopes: people who share my religious tradition or sacred worldview
people who share my racial or ethnic background or status
people in my economic class or material situation
people who share my gender position or gender-linked identity
people who share my sexuality or family-life orientation
people who share my core ideology or values
people on my political side, party, movement, or camp

priors_policy.q103_note: issue salience screener, not universal moral concern

trb_anchor_mapping.global: weak universalAffinity prior; no scoped excess
trb_anchor_mapping.mixed_none: universal/no-excess prior; suppresses scoped excess from that item

legacy_conversion.trb_without_anchor: generic boundary intensity only; do not assign scope without per-question review
legacy_conversion.pf_mapping: primarily low-weight political_camp scoped affinity prior
legacy_conversion.party_label_policy: party labels identify direction/membership, not magnitude

overlay_scope_map.White grievance voter: ethnic_racial plus matching membership label and grievance evidence
overlay_scope_map.Feminist voter: gender plus matching membership label or feminist-policy evidence
overlay_scope_map.Male grievance voter: gender plus matching membership label and grievance evidence

era_activation_migration.specific_scoped_era_activation: requires deliberate human edit pass or versioned companion map

stages.name: Spec
stages.description: ADR and JSON mirror only; no code changes

stages.name: Additive Types and Helpers
stages.description: types and pure helpers only; no engine cutover

stages.name: Additive Question Spec
stages.description: calibration battery spec or disabled/additive definitions

stages.name: Legacy Conversion Helpers
stages.description: pure conversion helpers from PF/TRB/TRB_ANCHOR to low-weight priors

stages.name: Smoke / Audit Harness
stages.description: prove formulas, null behavior, Q103 exclusion, and legacy-output preservation

stages.name: Engine Cutover
stages.description: out of scope until Terminal 1 review of B-E

non_goals: remove legacy fields in Phase 2.7 outputs
use vote choice, candidate thermometers, or downstream prediction outputs
